description: A scan of the first page of a U.S. Supreme Court slip opinion syllabus, headed 'SUPREME COURT OF THE UNITED STATES', 'OCTOBER TERM, 2025', for a case captioned 'URIAS-ORELLANA ET AL. v. BONDI, ATTORNEY GENERAL', certiorari to the First Circuit. The body of dense legal text summarizes an asylum case concerning the substantial-evidence standard of review and the Board of Immigration Appeals.
notable_text: SUPREME COURT OF THE UNITED STATES; OCTOBER TERM, 2025; URIAS-ORELLANA ET AL. v. BONDI, ATTORNEY GENERAL
